##RRUFFID=R060411

##LOCALITY=Maria Josefa, Rodalquilar, Almeria Province, Spain
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Pale green, yellow and colorless transparent single cubes associated with quartz

##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
